home.title: AIRO Essentials
home.subtitle: YOUR COMPLETE HEALTH & WELLNESS PARTNER
home.tagline: An ecosystem uniting nutrition, diagnostics, pharmacy, clinical care, and digital health.
home.description: At AIRO, we believe healthcare shouldn't be reactive. By integrating clinical precision with daily wellness, we build a connected environment designed to optimize your biology, ensure longevity, and prevent illness before it starts.

essentials.title: AIRO Essentials
essentials.subtitle: Fresh • Organic • Local • Wellness Retail
essentials.description: A carefully curated market featuring organic produce, functional groceries, and premium health goods selected to nourish your biology from the inside out.

pharmacy.title: AIRO Pharmacy
pharmacy.subtitle: Prescriptions • Supplements • Custom Compounding
pharmacy.description: Expert prescription management coupled with precision bio-available supplements and clinical wellness advice tailored to your personal biomarkers.

clinic.title: AIRO Minute Clinic
clinic.subtitle: Preventive Care • Walk-In Clinics • Screenings
clinic.description: Frictionless in-store and virtual medical services. Get immunizations, treatment, and proactive diagnostics with minimal wait times.

praana.title: AIRO Praana
praana.tagline: A 5-minute diagnostic assessment. A lifetime of longevity insights.
praana.description: Step into the future of diagnostics. The AIRO Smart Assessment Chair captures a comprehensive suite of key physiological indicators in just minutes, establishing a detailed baseline for your personalized care plan.
praana.metrics: Blood Pressure, Heart Rate & ECG, Blood Oxygen (SpO2), Respiratory Rate, Body Temperature, Weight & BMI
praana.connectedCareText: Your insights don't stop at the device. Results integrate instantly with your secure health profile, shared automatically with your providers. If needed, the ecosystem connects you directly to a healthcare professional for real-time clinical consultations.

grocery.subtitle: Better Everyday Eating.
grocery.heroTagline: More than a grocery store, AIRO Essentials is a curated destination for healthier everyday living.

hero.title: Daily Harvest

philosophy.title: Good Health Starts with Good Food
philosophy.description: What we eat decides how we feel. At AIRO Essentials, we believe you deserve the freshest, highest-quality groceries without any hassle. We carefully source the best local and organic products so you can feed your family with love and confidence.

fresh.title: Fresh
fresh.description: Seasonal fruits, vegetables, herbs, and freshly prepared foods selected for quality and taste.

organic.title: Organic
organic.description: Carefully sourced organic products that support healthier lifestyles and responsible farming practices.

local.title: Local
local.description: Supporting local producers and bringing communities closer to the foods they consume.

whySection.sectionDescription: We vet every supplier, audit every ingredient list, and verify sustainability metrics so you don't have to.

minuteClinic.title: Easy Checkups For
minuteClinic.subtitle: Your Busy Life.
minuteClinic.heroTagline: Professional care. Minimal waiting. Meaningful outcomes.
minuteClinic.heroDescription: AIRO Minute Clinic delivers convenient healthcare designed around modern lifestyles, making it easier to access trusted medical support whenever you need it.

hero.title: Quick Health Check
hero.description: Simple tests to keep you healthy and strong

friction.title: Healthcare Without the Wait
friction.description: Seeing a doctor shouldn't take hours of waiting. AIRO Minute Clinic is made to give you and your family quick, friendly medical care right when you need it most. Just walk in and get treated.

prevention.title: Stop Illness Before It Starts
prevention.description: We don't just treat you when you are sick. We help you stay healthy. With our simple blood tests and health screenings, we find small problems before they become big medical bills.

everydayCare.title: Everyday Care, Elevated
everydayCare.tagline: From seasonal illnesses and vaccinations to annual wellness visits and health screenings, our clinic supports your everyday needs.
everydayCare.description: Our clinic covers the full spectrum of day-to-day medical needs with a patient-first focus. We ensure you feel understood, treated, and guided toward optimal long-term health.
everydayCare.quote: Our goal is not simply to treat illness. It's to help people stay healthy.

connectedCare.title: Connected Healthcare
connectedCare.description: Healthcare works best when information, services, and providers work together. As part of the AIRO ecosystem, the Minute Clinic integrates with pharmacy services, diagnostics, wellness programs, and digital health tools to create a more complete picture of patient health.
connectedCare.tagline: A single appointment should be the beginning of a healthier future—not the end of a conversation.
connectedCare.bodyText: Through ongoing monitoring, preventive health programs, advanced diagnostics, and wellness support, AIRO helps patients take a more active role in their long-term health.

visionSection.title: The New Standard for Community Healthcare.
visionSection.description: AIRO Minute Clinic is redefining what modern healthcare can look like—bringing together clinical expertise, advanced technology, and a patient-first philosophy to create a better healthcare experience for everyone.

pharmacy.title: Your Trusted Pharmacy.
pharmacy.subtitle: Care You Can Count On.
pharmacy.heroTagline: Healthcare is evolving. Your pharmacy should too.
pharmacy.heroDescription: AIRO Pharmacy combines trusted prescription care, advanced wellness solutions, personalized compounding, and expert guidance in one elevated experience designed around your health.

philosophy.title: A Different Kind of Pharmacy
philosophy.tagline: Most pharmacies focus on transactions. We focus on people.
philosophy.description: At AIRO Pharmacy, every product, recommendation, and service is chosen with one goal: helping individuals live healthier, longer, and better.
philosophy.bodyText: Whether you're managing a chronic condition, optimizing daily wellness, or exploring preventive healthcare solutions, our team is here to support your journey.

ecosystem.title: Healthcare Beyond Prescriptions
ecosystem.tagline: Today's health challenges require more than medication alone.
ecosystem.description: That's why AIRO Pharmacy is designed as part of a connected healthcare ecosystem, bringing together pharmacy services, diagnostics, clinical care, wellness programs, and personalized treatments.
ecosystem.closingLine: Because better outcomes happen when healthcare works together.

compounding.title: Special Medicines Just For You
compounding.description: Sometimes normal tablets don't work for everyone. AIRO Pharmacy makes special mixed medicines, custom skin creams, and proper dosages exactly the way your doctor ordered.
compounding.previewText: Compounding allows us to design allergen-free alternatives, tailor dosages to the microgram, and merge multiple supplements into a single daily biological protocol.

everyday.title: Easy Medicine Refills
everyday.description: Taking daily medicines should be simple. With AIRO Pharmacy, you get genuine medicines on time, clear advice from expert pharmacists, and total peace of mind for your family's health.

catalogSection.sectionDescription: Every category is built as a targeted pathway to clinical-grade care and longevity protocols.

closingSection.sectionDescription: At AIRO Pharmacy, we believe healthcare should feel simpler, more human, and more accessible.
closingSection.sectionTagline: A place where expert care, innovative solutions, and everyday wellness come together.

categories.title: First Aid

hero.title: AIRO Praana
hero.metrics: Blood Pressure, Heart Rate & ECG, SpO₂, Respiratory Rate, Temperature, Weight & BMI

assessment.title: The Magic 5-Minute Checkup
assessment.description: The AIRO Praana chair checks your heart, breathing, and general health without any needles or touching. Just sit back, relax, and let the smart sensors read your body's health in real-time.

steps.title: Take a Seat
steps.description: Relax in the AIRO chair as the intuitive sensors automatically activate to begin your assessment.

steps.title: Assessment Begins
steps.description: Clinical-grade sensors capture your vitals in real-time, analyzing hundreds of data points instantly.

steps.title: Receive Profile
steps.description: Your secure, comprehensive health report is immediately sent to your AIRO App for review.

insights.title: Easy To Understand Results
insights.description: We don't give you confusing doctor reports. AIRO Praana gives you simple, clear advice on what to eat, how to exercise, and how to live a longer, healthier life.

cards.title: Trend Tracking
cards.description: Monitor changes and improvements over time.

cards.title: Doctor Review
cards.description: Data verified by AIRO clinical professionals.

cards.title: AIRO Record
cards.description: Your entire health history, securely stored.

connectedEcosystem.title: Connected To The Entire AIRO Ecosystem
connectedEcosystem.nodes: Health Scan, AIRO App, Minute Clinic, Doctor Consult, Pharmacy

preventiveSection.title: Know Earlier. Act Sooner.
preventiveSection.description: People shouldn't feel they're using a machine. They should feel they're gaining unprecedented visibility into their own health.
